scripts.clean:portal: bun -e "import { rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; await rm('app/static/app/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.bundle:portal: bun build $(bun run list:portal) --outdir app/static/app/dist --outbase app/static/app/src/ --sourcemap --minify --splitting --chunk-naming 'chunk-[hash].[ext]'
scripts.build:portal: bun run clean:portal && bun run bundle:portal
scripts.build: bun run build:portal && bun run build:rest
